query: when is the next bus 11 arriving at stop 4476?
expected_behavior: Should query real-time GPS data (oraHHMM empty) and return upcoming arrivals for line 11 at stop 4476

query: check the tper bus schedule for line 11 at stop 4476 for 6:30 PM
expected_behavior: Should convert 6:30 PM to 1830 and query scheduled arrivals

query: what time does bus 27 arrive at stop 8001 at 3:15 PM?
expected_behavior: Should convert 3:15 PM to 1515 and query scheduled arrivals for line 27
Should query real-time GPS data for line 11 at stop 4476

query: when's the next 11 at 4476 gonna come?
expected_behavior: Should recognize informal phrasing and query real-time data
Should convert 9am to 0900 and query scheduled arrivals (note: API may not support future dates, but time conversion should work)

expected_behavior: Should NOT trigger - this is route planning, not a specific stop/line query
